The '''''Warrior''''' was the first [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]] to be produced under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Class Modernization Program]] for [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. It was then assigned to the inaugural [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]].

The ''Warrior'' was a perimeter patrol ship for the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], shortly before the [[Battle of N'zoth]]. The entire Fifth Fleet had been assembled, and it was necessary to station warships along the perimeter to prevent intrusion and detection by [[Yevetha]]n probes. It did not find any [[Yevetha]]n intruders, and instead, detected the [[Adventurer|Verpine Adventurer]] ''[[Mud Sloth]]'', which was carrying [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]]. The ''Warrior'' intercepted it, and the captain of the [[Warrior-class gunship|gunship]] communicated with the ''Mud Sloth'' and found the identity of the pilot.

The ''Warrior'' communicated with the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']], flagship of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]], asking if Luke should be able to speak to the command staff as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] wished. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] spoke of his desire to meet the famous [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and the ''Warrior'' escorted in the unwieldy civilian starship.

This [[Warrior-class gunship|gunship]] survived the [[Battle of N'zoth]].
